name: jobmind-match-mobile-wrapper
description: Capacitor Android wrapper for JobMind Match

scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:prepare:jdk17 ; cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:prepare:jdk17 ; cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.icons:sync: npm run icons:generate && npx cap sync android
